headline: Bitcoin Nears $60K Amid Rising Macro Risks

article.title: Bitcoin price $60K support not yet safe as more macro headwinds stack up
article.summary: Bitcoin analysis warned that $60,000 may not hold next, as bear-market moves continued and macro hurdles multiplied.

article.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1.7B as outflow streak hits four weeks
article.summary: BlackRock’s IBIT accounted for most of the weekly Bitcoin ETF redemptions, while Fidelity and Grayscale funds also saw outflows.

article.title: Buyer Flips London Mega Mansion for £56 Million Mark Up
article.summary: The mystery buyer who acquired a mansion in London’s Regent’s Park at the end of 2024 has sold the property for about £195 million ($260 million) in one of the UK’s highest value sales of all time.

headline: Oil Prices Plunge 5% Amid Iran-Israel Truce

article.title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks That Threatened Talks
article.summary: Iran and Israel agreed to ease strikes against each other after a flare-up in violence threatened to derail peace negotiations and led President Donald Trump to appeal for de-escalation.

headline: Zcash Surges $2.5B on Supply Fix Prospect

article.title: 'Extremely Bullish': Zcash Rebounds By $2.5 Billion Amid Planned Fix for Supply Conundrum
article.summary: Zcash pared steep losses after the privacy coin's backers introduced an upgrade aimed at restoring faith in the digital asset's supply.

headline: BitMine Invests $214M in Ethereum Amid Selloff

headline: STRC Preferred Stock Pays 2% Semi-Monthly Dividends

article.summary: "Paying dividends on STRC twice a month is designed to stabilize price, dampen cyclicality, drive liquidity, and grow demand for STRC," Strategy's CEO said.

headline: TON Staking Surges 3.3M in May Amid Upgrades

article.summary: TON Strategy made approximately $5.6 million in staking rewards for May and is staking nearly all of its over 227 million tokens.
